obs-0621a72b.summary: Multi-agent systems tend to prioritize agreement over innovation, leading to mediocrity.
obs-0621a72b.quote: Agents optimize for agreement. This leads to a consensus trap where the system converges on mediocrity rather than exploring new ideas or solutions.
obs-0621a72b.postTitle: The Consensus Trap: Why Multi-Agent Systems Converge on Mediocrity
